reforms.description: Austria plans to increase access to high-quality internet throughout the country to achieve the national and EU goal of Gigabit connectivity for all households by 2030.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing digital infrastructure is expected to facilitate innovation, improve productivity, and support the digital economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiative to expand Gigabit connectivity has been publicly announced.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant for enhancing the digital infrastructure, which is critical for supporting innovation and economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: Increase access to high-quality internet throughout the entire country and achieve the national and EU goal of Gigabit connectivity for all households by 2030.

reforms.description: Austria is considering the use of well-designed direct R&D grants to support longer-term, higher-risk research initiatives, particularly in the high-tech sector.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Providing direct R&D grants is expected to stimulate innovation in the high-tech sector, leading to increased productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The consideration of direct R&D grants has been publicly announced.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it aims to enhance public support for R&D in the high-tech sector, which is crucial for fostering innovation.
reforms.source_quote: Consider using well-designed direct R&D grants to support longer term, higher-risk research.

reforms.description: Austria's Recovery and Resilience Plan includes a 'Research, Technology and Innovation Strategy 2030' aimed at supporting investments in universities and research centres, with a budget of EUR 212 million.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The strategy aims to enhance research capabilities and innovation, which are critical for long-term economic growth and competitiveness.
reforms.status_evidence: The plan was submitted to the European Commission in April 2021 and approved in July.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant investment in the research sector, aiming to bolster Austria's innovation landscape and align with EU recovery efforts.
reforms.source_quote: 1. Research (EUR 212 million) contains a ‘Research, Technology and Innovation Strategy 2030’ and will support investments in universities and research centres.

reforms.description: The Austrian government has introduced a 'Renewables Expansion Law' as part of its strategy to increase the share of carbon-free electricity to 100% by 2030, which includes significant investments in research and innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This law aims to drive innovation in renewable energy technologies, which is essential for achieving climate goals and fostering economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The Renewables Expansion Law was adopted in 2020 to increase the share of carbon-free electricity.
reforms.importance_rationale: This law represents a fundamental shift in energy policy, promoting significant investments in renewable energy and innovation.
reforms.source_quote: A new 'Renewables Expansion Law' was adopted in 2020 to increase the share of carbon-free electricity to 100% by 2030.

reforms.description: Austria's Recovery and Resilience Plan is fostering several carbon-saving investments, including zero-emission buses and building renovations, supported by EU grants of around EUR 2 billion.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Investments in green technologies and infrastructure are expected to enhance productivity and support sustainable economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The plan is actively funding various carbon-saving projects.
reforms.importance_rationale: The plan represents a significant investment in green technologies, which is crucial for achieving climate goals and fostering innovation in the sector.
reforms.source_quote: Austria’s Recovery and Resilience Plan is fostering several carbon-saving investments in the above areas.

reforms.description: The temporary 7% cash investment subsidy introduced during the pandemic included an additional premium for green investments, significantly boosting applications from micro-enterprises.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The subsidy incentivizes green investments, which can lead to increased innovation and economic activity in sustainable sectors.
reforms.status_evidence: The market response was strong, with many applications submitted.
reforms.importance_rationale: The subsidy represents a significant but temporary measure to stimulate investment in green technologies during the pandemic.
reforms.source_quote: The temporary 7% cash investment subsidy introduced during the pandemic had an additional premium of 7% for green investments.

reforms.description: Austria aims to stimulate business dynamism by facilitating market entries and supporting firms' capacity to invest, which includes providing the right incentives for R&D to boost long-term innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Encouraging R&D investment is expected to enhance innovation capacity, leading to increased productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: Public policies should aim at further stimulating business dynamism.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant policy direction aimed at enhancing R&D incentives and business dynamism, which is crucial for long-term economic resilience.
reforms.source_quote: Public policies should aim at further stimulating business dynamism by facilitating market entries; supporting firms’ capacity to invest by helping strengthen their balance sheets; better adapting skills to jobs for all categories of workers; and providing the right incentives to R&D to boost long-term innovation.

reforms.description: Austria aims to improve the effectiveness of start-up and growth financing instruments to stimulate business dynamism, particularly by simplifying processes and enhancing conditions for institutional investors in venture capital.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving access to financing, the reform is expected to foster innovation and entrepreneurship, leading to increased productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiative has been put into action to enhance financing for start-ups.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant improvement in the financing landscape for start-ups, which is crucial for fostering innovation and economic recovery.
reforms.source_quote: Improve the effectiveness of start-up and growth financing instruments, including by avoiding complexity, scaling up later stage funding and improving conditions for institutional investors to invest in venture capital.

reforms.description: Austria's Broadband Strategy 2030 aims to achieve nationwide investments in Gigabit connectivity, addressing the challenges posed by the country's topography and population density.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing digital infrastructure is expected to facilitate innovation and improve productivity across various sectors of the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The strategy has been initiated to improve broadband connectivity across Austria.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative is a significant step towards improving digital infrastructure, which is essential for supporting innovation and economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: The Broadband Strategy 2030 aims at considerable nation-wide investments in Gigabit connectivity.

reforms.description: The government has committed to providing access to Gigabit connectivity for all Austrian households by 2030, including through public-private partnerships in areas lacking commercial incentives.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving digital infrastructure is expected to enhance connectivity, which can drive productivity and innovation across various sectors.
reforms.status_evidence: The government’s commitment to Gigabit connectivity has been publicly stated.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant investment in digital infrastructure, which is crucial for enhancing overall economic performance and competitiveness.
reforms.source_quote: The government’s commitment to give access to Gigabit connectivity to all Austrian households by 2030, including via public-private partnerships in geographical areas where commercial incentives are not strong, is welcome.

reforms.description: Austria established the 'Austrian Micro Data Center' in 2021 to enhance access to official data for researchers, thereby improving the research infrastructure in the country.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving access to data for researchers can enhance the quality of research and inform better policymaking, ultimately supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The Austrian Micro Data Center was established in 2021.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the data center represents a significant step in enhancing research capabilities and data accessibility, which is crucial for informed decision-making.
reforms.source_quote: With the establishment of the 'Austrian Micro Data Center' in 2021 official data is being made more widely available to researchers.

reforms.description: Austria introduced direct public subsidies to business investment, increasing the standard subsidy from 7% to 14% for investments in greening, digitalisation, and health projects, excluding climate-damaging investments.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The subsidies incentivize businesses to invest in sustainable and digital projects, which can enhance productivity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has provided substantial funding for these subsidies.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant adjustment to existing investment support mechanisms, targeting key areas for economic recovery and future growth.
reforms.source_quote: New investments have benefitted from a standard 7% subsidy, which was doubled to 14% for investments in the areas of greening, digitalisation, and health projects.

reforms.description: Austria allocated EUR 605 million to support digital and green investments by private businesses, aiming to enhance innovation and sustainability in the business sector.
reforms.component_name: Digitalisation and Ecological Transformation of Businesses
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This investment is expected to boost productivity and innovation in the private sector, facilitating a transition towards more sustainable business practices.
reforms.status_evidence: The funding has been allocated to support digital and green investments.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant investment aimed at enhancing the innovation capacity of businesses, particularly in the context of digitalisation and sustainability.
reforms.source_quote: Digitalisation and ecological transformation of businesses (EUR 605 million) will support digital and green investments by private businesses.

reforms.description: The Austrian government initiated a re-skilling and up-skilling program with a budget of EUR 277 million to support the re-training of the unemployed, focusing on enhancing human capital for innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the skills of the workforce, this program aims to improve employability and support innovation in various sectors.
reforms.status_evidence: The program has been launched with allocated funding for re-training initiatives.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative is a significant step towards enhancing the skills of the workforce, which is crucial for fostering innovation and economic recovery.
reforms.source_quote: Re-skilling and up-skilling (EUR 277 million) will support the re-training of the unemployed.

reforms.description: Austria introduced a universal job guarantee programme in 2021, providing guaranteed paid work for residents unemployed for over 12 months, with a focus on training and support for self-employment.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The programme aims to stimulate entrepreneurship and job creation, thereby enhancing economic activity and reducing long-term unemployment.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme guarantees paid work and includes detailed evaluation provisions.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the approach to unemployment, integrating various support mechanisms to enhance job creation and self-employment.
reforms.source_quote: A universal job guarantee experiment... guarantees a fully-paid job to every Marienthal resident who has been unemployed for more than 12 months.

reforms.description: Austria's Ministry of Environment has estimated that for every million Euro of government help for building rehabilitations and insulations, five net new jobs are created, indicating a strong commitment to fostering growth in renewable energy sectors.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The investment in building rehabilitations and insulations not only creates jobs but also supports the transition to renewable energy, enhancing overall economic productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has committed to a strong growth path in renewable energies.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant investment in the renewable energy sector, which is crucial for job creation and economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: Austria’s Ministry of Environment has estimated that for every million Euro of government help for building rehabilitations and insulations, five net new jobs are created.

reforms.description: The ongoing transition to electrical traction in Austria's car cluster is expected to create new business opportunities and restructuring in the value chains, with significant investments in upcoming technologies such as hydrogen engines.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Investments in new technologies and the transition to electrical traction are likely to enhance productivity and create new market opportunities.
reforms.status_evidence: Several Austrian firms are well-resourced and are already positioning themselves in these new niches.
reforms.importance_rationale: The transition in the car cluster represents a significant shift towards sustainable technologies, impacting a major sector of the economy.
reforms.source_quote: The ongoing transition to electrical traction is overhauling the entire value chain.

reforms.description: Austria is implementing a new corporate form to facilitate the scaling-up of start-ups and young firms, which combines aspects of stock corporation law and limited liability law, allowing for less bureaucratic founding procedures and greater employee participation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This reform aims to enhance the business environment for start-ups, potentially increasing their growth and contribution to the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The new corporate form is underway to help start-ups scale up more effectively.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the corporate landscape, aimed at fostering entrepreneurship and innovation.
reforms.source_quote: A new corporate form is under way and should help a faster scaling-up of start-ups and young firms.

reforms.description: The Austrian government is prioritizing digitalisation as part of its strategy to establish Austria as a leading business location, with a focus on improving the adoption of key digital technologies among firms.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing digitalisation is expected to improve productivity and competitiveness among firms, particularly SMEs.
reforms.status_evidence: Digitalisation is a key priority for the Austrian government and a central element in the Next Generation EU package.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a comprehensive approach to enhancing the digital capabilities of the economy, which is crucial for future growth.
reforms.source_quote: Digitalisation is a key priority for the Austrian government and a central element in the Next Generation EU package.

reforms.description: The Austrian government has launched the 'Digital Competence Pact' aimed at improving digital skills across all age groups, with specific initiatives targeting SMEs through programs like 'Digital Skills Vouchers' and 'Innovation Camps'.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing digital skills is expected to improve productivity and innovation capacity among firms, particularly in the SME sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has prioritized developing digital skills through various programs.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant effort to address skill gaps in the workforce, which is crucial for enhancing innovation and competitiveness.
reforms.source_quote: Developing digital skills is a major priority for the government. Programmes like the 'Digital Competence Pact' aim at improving digital skills across all age groups.

reforms.description: Austria introduced a new national financial literacy strategy aimed at increasing financial literacy and raising awareness among entrepreneurs about alternative financing options available in the capital market.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving financial literacy can enhance understanding of financing options, thereby fostering investment and innovation among entrepreneurs.
reforms.status_evidence: The strategy was disclosed to the public in October 2021.
reforms.importance_rationale: The strategy represents a significant effort to enhance financial literacy, which is crucial for improving access to capital and supporting entrepreneurship.
reforms.source_quote: In October 2021, a new national financial literacy strategy for Austria was disclosed to the public.

reforms.description: Austria is implementing a reform to abolish deduction-free early retirement pensions, which will take effect on December 31, 2021. This reform aims to encourage older workers to remain in the labor force longer, thereby contributing to a more sustainable retirement system.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By encouraging older workers to stay in the workforce longer, the reform can enhance labor market participation and reduce the financial burden on the pension system.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform to abolish deduction-free early retirement pensions has been officially announced and is set to take effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in retirement policy aimed at improving labor market dynamics and sustainability of the pension system.
reforms.source_quote: The recent reform from December 2020, which abolished a pathway to early retirement for workers of certain occupations without deductions, was a step in the right direction.

reforms.description: Austria is considering the introduction of individual training accounts to enhance participation in lifelong learning. This reform aims to create a competitive market for re-skilling services and improve access to training opportunities, particularly for lower-skilled individuals.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating access to training, this reform can enhance the skills of the workforce, thereby improving productivity and economic performance.
reforms.status_evidence: The proposal for individual training accounts has been discussed as a promising approach to improve participation in adult learning programmes.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform could significantly enhance the effectiveness of lifelong learning policies in Austria, addressing skill mismatches and improving workforce adaptability.
reforms.source_quote: Individual training accounts can be put in place to create a competitive market for re-skilling services.

reforms.description: Austria adopted the 'new RTI Strategy 2030' in December 2020, aiming to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of its investments in research and innovation, with a focus on diversifying the research portfolio and increasing support for high-technology sectors.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By diversifying R&D funding and focusing on high-tech sectors, the strategy is expected to enhance innovation capacity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The strategy was adopted in December 2020.
reforms.importance_rationale: The strategy represents a significant overhaul of Austria's approach to R&D funding, aiming to position the country as a leader in innovation and high-tech industries.
reforms.source_quote: Going forward, Austria should attach a high priority on increasing the efficiency and effectiveness of its investments in research and innovation.
